message:
test(fwc): expand trace_cmd, manifest_cmd, and net_cmd test suites

trace_cmd: 14 → 58 tests (+44) — format conversion edge cases, report
field invariants, JSON stability, diff rendering, summary calculation,
clone/debug/eq behavior, decision count map roundtrips, Unicode handling.

manifest_cmd: 23 → 64 tests (+41) — args clone/field combos, fix report
JSON structure, special character handling, filesystem error handling,
check_only logic, print_human_report branch coverage, serde roundtrips.

net_cmd: 33 → 110 tests (+77) — parse_url_info, deny/error reason codes,
resolve_ip_literal, match_cidr, rule_id_for, suggestion_for, build_report,
deny_report, serialization edge cases, struct construction/traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
